name: Fitvia Corp.
summary: Fitvia Corp. engages in the writing of patents. The company is also involved in writing business plans for small, medium, and large companies. It also provides valuation services that figure out dead net costs on food products. The company was formerly known as Breezer Ventures Inc. and changed its name to Fitvia Corp. in February 2016. Fitvia Corp. was founded in 2005 and is based in Yau Tong, Hong Kong.
